title: Environment.reset() hangs when Docker container is unreachable
body:
If the Docker daemon is down or the container exited, `env.reset()` blocks forever instead of raising a timeout error.

Expected: `TimeoutError` after 30s.
Actual: hangs indefinitely.

title: Support async iteration over evaluation results
body: Currently `Evaluator.run()` returns a list. For large benchmarks (1000+ tasks), this consumes too much memory. Add `async for result in evaluator.run_iter()` support.

title: Fix type hints for Grade.from_subscores()
body: The return type annotation says `Grade` but it actually returns `Optional[Grade]` when the input list is empty. mypy reports errors.
